  "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration.   "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n### Content <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [ ] **QUAL-06**: Content validation enforced in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **QUAL-07**: QA agent validates every agent output (continuous gate, not single pipeline hardening)\n\n### Observability\n\n- [ ] **OBSV-01**: Trace modal displays LLM call counts per wave and agent\n- [ ] **OBSV-02**: Trace modal displays timing breakdown per agent and wave\n- [ ]   "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n### Content <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [ ] **QUAL-06**: Content validation enforced in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **QUAL-07**: QA agent validates every agent output (continuous gate, not single pipeline hardening)\n\n### Observability\n\n- [ ] **OBSV-01**: Trace modal displays LLM call counts per wave and agent\n- [ ] **OBSV-02**: Trace modal displays timing breakdown per agent and wave\n- [ ] Return ROADMAP CREATED with summary\n\nKey context for phasing:\n- AGNT-* (agent integration) is the foundation — must come first\n- KGOP-* (KG operations) depends on persistence agent being restored (AGNT-03)\n- QUAL-07/QUAL-08 (QA agent as continuous gate) is architecturally significant — QA validates EVERY agent output, coordinator gets feedback\n- OBSV-* (trace modal) can be done independently but benefits from agents being in place first\n- There are 19 requirements total across 4 categories\n\nWrite files first, then return.\n</instructions>\n"
}
```

  "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n###   "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n### Content <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [ ] **QUAL-06**: Content validation enforced in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **QUAL-07**: QA agent validates every agent output (continuous gate, not single pipeline stage)\n- [ ] **QUAL-08**: Coordinator receives QA feedback and can reject/retry agent outputs\n- [ ] **QUAL-09**: Hallucination guards completed (L3 caps, code evidence filter, prompt hardening)\n\n### Observability\n\n- [ ] **OBSV-01**: Trace modal displays LLM call counts per wave and agent\n- [ ] **OBSV-02**: Trace modal displays timing breakdown per agent and wave\n- [ ] **OBSV-03**: Trace modal displays model info (which LLM, provider)\n- [ ] **OBSV-04**: Trace modal shows data flow — what went in/out of each agent to diagnose information loss\n\n## Future Requirements\n\n### VKB Navigation (v2.2)\n\n- **VKBN-01**: Tree navigation with hierarchy drill-down\n- **VKBN-02**: Breadcrumb navigation showing hierarchy path\n- **VKBN-03**: Entity detail view with observations and insight documents\n- **QUAL-04**: VKB entity detail panel shows \"Detailed Insight\" link to the insight document\n- **VKB-01**: Collapsible tree sidebar showing full hierarchy\n- **VKB-02**: Clicking a tree node filters the D3 graph to that subtree\n- **VKB-03**: Breadcrumb navigation computed from parent chain\n- **VKB-04**: Blue gradient visualization persists\n\n### Scoring (future)\n\n- **SIG-01**: Significance scoring for entities\n- **SIG-02**: <USER_ID_REDACTED> ranking for observations\n\n## Out of Scope\n\n| Feature | Reason |\n|---------|--------|\n| VKB tree navigation | v2.2 scope — v2.1 focuses on pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> |\n| MCP server interface changes | `ukb full` invocation must stay the same |\n| Agent framework rewrite | Extend existing coordinator, don't rewrite |\n| Real-time pipeline monitoring | Trace modal is sufficient for current needs |\n| Significance scoring | Revisit after pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> restored |\n\n## Traceability\n\nWhich phases cover which requirements.\n\n### v2.0 (Shipped)\n\n| Requirement | Phase | Status |\n|-------------|-------|--------|\n| WAVE-01 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| WAVE-02 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| WAVE-03 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| WAVE-04 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| WAVE-05 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| WAVE-06 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| QUAL-01 | Phase 6 | Complete |\n| QUAL-02 | Phase 6 | Complete |\n| QUAL-03 | Phase 6 | Complete |\n| QUAL-05 | Phase 6 | Complete |\n| HIER-01 | Phase 7 | Complete |\n| HIER-02 | Phase 7 | Complete |\n| HIER-03 | Phase 7 | Complete |\n| HIER-04 | Phase 7 | Complete |\n\n### v2.1\n\n| Requirement | Phase | Status |\n|-------------|-------|--------|\n| AGNT-01 | — | Pending |\n| AGNT-02 | — | Pending |\n| AGNT-03 | — | Pending |\n| AGNT-04 | — | Pending |\n| AGNT-05 | — | Pending |\n| KGOP-01 | — | Pending |\n| KGOP-02 | — | Pending |\n| KGOP-03 | — | Pending |\n| KGOP-04 | — | Pending |\n| KGOP-05 | — | Pending |\n| KGOP-06 | — | Pending |\n| QUAL-06 | — | Pending |\n| QUAL-07 | — | Pending |\n| QUAL-08 | — | Pending |\n| QUAL-09 | — | Pending |\n| OBSV-01 | — | Pending |\n| OBSV-02 | — | Pending |\n| OBSV-03 | — | Pending |\n| OBSV-04 | — | Pending |\n\n**Coverage:**\n- v2.1 requirements: 19 total\n- Mapped to phases: 0\n- Unmapped: 19\n\n---\n*Last updated: 2026-03-07*\n"
}

  "new_string": "  whitelist:\n  - '**/README.md'\n  - '**/CHANGELOG.md'\n  - '**/CLAUDE.md'\n  - '**/MEMORY.md'\n  - '**/INSTALL*.md'\n  - CLAUDE.md\n  # GSD planning files use uppercase by convention\n  # Need both patterns: *.md for direct files, **/*.md for subdirectories\n  - '**/.planning/*.md'\n  - '**/.planning/**/*.md'"
}

  "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n### Use git for history.'\n  severity: error\n  enabled: true\n  applies_to: content\n  tool_filter:\n  - Edit\n  - Write\n  file_pattern: \\.md$\n  suggestion: Remove dates and incremental language. Describe how the system works\n    NOW, not when it changed. Git provides version history.\n  whitelist:\n  - CHANGELOG.md\n  - RELEASE*.md\n  - '**/.planning/**/*.md'"
}
```

  "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration.   "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n### Content <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [ ] **QUAL-06**: Content validation enforced in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **QUAL-07**: QA agent validates every agent output (continuous gate, not single pipeline hardening)\n\n### Observability\n\n- [ ] **OBSV-01**: Trace modal displays LLM call counts per wave and agent\n- [ ] **OBSV-02**: Trace modal displays timing breakdown per agent and wave\n- [ ]   "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n### Content <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [ ] **QUAL-06**: Content validation enforced in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **QUAL-07**: QA agent validates every agent output (continuous gate, not single pipeline hardening)\n\n### Observability\n\n- [ ] **OBSV-01**: Trace modal displays LLM call counts per wave and agent\n- [ ] **OBSV-02**: Trace modal displays timing breakdown per agent and wave\n- [ ] Return ROADMAP CREATED with summary\n\nKey context for phasing:\n- AGNT-* (agent integration) is the foundation — must come first\n- KGOP-* (KG operations) depends on persistence agent being restored (AGNT-03)\n- QUAL-07/QUAL-08 (QA agent as continuous gate) is architecturally significant — QA validates EVERY agent output, coordinator gets feedback\n- OBSV-* (trace modal) can be done independently but benefits from agents being in place first\n- There are 19 requirements total across 4 categories\n\nWrite files first, then return.\n</instructions>\n"
}
```

  "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n###   "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n### Content <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [ ] **QUAL-06**: Content validation enforced in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **QUAL-07**: QA agent validates every agent output (continuous gate, not single pipeline stage)\n- [ ] **QUAL-08**: Coordinator receives QA feedback and can reject/retry agent outputs\n- [ ] **QUAL-09**: Hallucination guards completed (L3 caps, code evidence filter, prompt hardening)\n\n### Observability\n\n- [ ] **OBSV-01**: Trace modal displays LLM call counts per wave and agent\n- [ ] **OBSV-02**: Trace modal displays timing breakdown per agent and wave\n- [ ] **OBSV-03**: Trace modal displays model info (which LLM, provider)\n- [ ] **OBSV-04**: Trace modal shows data flow — what went in/out of each agent to diagnose information loss\n\n## Future Requirements\n\n### VKB Navigation (v2.2)\n\n- **VKBN-01**: Tree navigation with hierarchy drill-down\n- **VKBN-02**: Breadcrumb navigation showing hierarchy path\n- **VKBN-03**: Entity detail view with observations and insight documents\n- **QUAL-04**: VKB entity detail panel shows \"Detailed Insight\" link to the insight document\n- **VKB-01**: Collapsible tree sidebar showing full hierarchy\n- **VKB-02**: Clicking a tree node filters the D3 graph to that subtree\n- **VKB-03**: Breadcrumb navigation computed from parent chain\n- **VKB-04**: Blue gradient visualization persists\n\n### Scoring (future)\n\n- **SIG-01**: Significance scoring for entities\n- **SIG-02**: <USER_ID_REDACTED> ranking for observations\n\n## Out of Scope\n\n| Feature | Reason |\n|---------|--------|\n| VKB tree navigation | v2.2 scope — v2.1 focuses on pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> |\n| MCP server interface changes | `ukb full` invocation must stay the same |\n| Agent framework rewrite | Extend existing coordinator, don't rewrite |\n| Real-time pipeline monitoring | Trace modal is sufficient for current needs |\n| Significance scoring | Revisit after pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> restored |\n\n## Traceability\n\nWhich phases cover which requirements.\n\n### v2.0 (Shipped)\n\n| Requirement | Phase | Status |\n|-------------|-------|--------|\n| WAVE-01 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| WAVE-02 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| WAVE-03 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| WAVE-04 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| WAVE-05 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| WAVE-06 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| QUAL-01 | Phase 6 | Complete |\n| QUAL-02 | Phase 6 | Complete |\n| QUAL-03 | Phase 6 | Complete |\n| QUAL-05 | Phase 6 | Complete |\n| HIER-01 | Phase 7 | Complete |\n| HIER-02 | Phase 7 | Complete |\n| HIER-03 | Phase 7 | Complete |\n| HIER-04 | Phase 7 | Complete |\n\n### v2.1\n\n| Requirement | Phase | Status |\n|-------------|-------|--------|\n| AGNT-01 | — | Pending |\n| AGNT-02 | — | Pending |\n| AGNT-03 | — | Pending |\n| AGNT-04 | — | Pending |\n| AGNT-05 | — | Pending |\n| KGOP-01 | — | Pending |\n| KGOP-02 | — | Pending |\n| KGOP-03 | — | Pending |\n| KGOP-04 | — | Pending OBSV-02 | — | Pending |\n| OBSV-03 | — | Pending |\n| OBSV-04 | — | Pending |\n\n**Coverage:**\n- v2.1 requirements: 19 total\n- Mapped to phases: 0\n- Unmapped: 19\n\n---\n*Last updated: }

{

  "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n### Content <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [ ] **QUAL-06**: Content validation enforced in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **QUAL-07**: QA agent validates every agent output (continuous gate, not single pipeline stage)\n- [ ] **QUAL-08**: Coordinator receives QA feedback and can reject/retry agent outputs\n- [ ] **QUAL-09**: Hallucination guards completed (L3 caps, code evidence filter, prompt hardening)\n\n### Observability\n\n- [ ] **OBSV-01**: Trace modal displays LLM call counts per wave and agent\n- [ ] **OBSV-02**: Trace modal displays timing breakdown per agent and wave\n- [ ] **OBSV-03**: Trace modal displays model info (which LLM, provider)\n- [ ] **OBSV-04**: Trace modal shows data flow — what went in/out of each agent to diagnose information loss\n\n## Future Requirements\n\n### VKB Navigation (v2.2)\n\n- **VKBN-01**: Tree navigation with hierarchy drill-down\n- **VKBN-02**: Breadcrumb navigation showing hierarchy path\n- **VKBN-03**: Entity detail view hierarchy\n- **VKB-02**: Clicking a tree node filters the D3 graph to that subtree\n- **VKB-03**: Breadcrumb navigation computed from parent chain\n- **VKB-04**: Blue gradient visualization   "new_string": "- id: no-incremental-documentation\n  group: documentation\n  pattern: (?i)\\b(fixed|improved|added|updated|changed|modified|removed|deprecated|enhanced|new|now|recent|recently|previous|previously|old|older|formerly|originally|was|were|used\n    to be)\\s+(in|on|for|during|as of)?\\s*(jan|feb|mar|apr|may|jun|jul|aug|sep|oct|nov|dec|january|february|march|april|june|july|august|september|october|november|december)?\\s*\\d{4}\\b|\\b(dec|nov|oct|sep|aug|jul|jun|may|apr|mar|feb|jan)\\s*\\d{4}\\b|(?:since|as of|in|from)\\s+v\\d+\\.\\d+|version\\s+\\d+\\.\\d+\\s+(?:added|changed|fixed|updated)|\\(fixed\\)|\\(added\\)|\\(improved\\)|\\(updated\\)\n  message: 'CRITICAL: Documentation describes CURRENT state only - no version history,\n    fix dates, or incremental language. Use git for history.'\n  severity: error\n  enabled: true\n  applies_to: content\n  tool_filter:\n  - Edit\n  - Write\n  file_pattern: \\.md$\n  suggestion: Remove dates and incremental language. Describe how the system works\n    NOW, not when it changed. Git provides version history.\n  whitelist:\n  - CHANGELOG.md\n  - RELEASE*.md\n  - '**/.planning/**/*.md'"
}

  "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n###   "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n### Content <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [ ] **QUAL-06**: Content validation enforced in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **QUAL-07**: QA agent validates every agent output (continuous gate, not single pipeline stage)\n- [ ] **QUAL-08**: Coordinator receives QA feedback and can reject/retry agent outputs\n- [ ] **QUAL-09**: Hallucination guards completed (L3 caps, code evidence filter, prompt hardening)\n\n### Observability\n\n- [ ] **OBSV-01**: Trace modal displays LLM call counts per wave and agent\n- [ ] **OBSV-02**: Trace modal displays timing breakdown per agent and wave\n- [ ] **OBSV-03**: Trace modal displays model info (which LLM, provider)\n- [ ] **OBSV-04**: Trace modal shows data flow — what went in/out of each agent to diagnose information loss\n\n## Future hierarchy\n- **VKB-02**: Clicking a tree node filters the D3 graph to that subtree\n- **VKB-03**: Breadcrumb navigation computed from parent chain\n- **VKB-04**: Blue gradient visualization   "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n### Content <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [ ] **QUAL-06**: Content validation enforced in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **QUAL-07**: QA agent validates every agent output (continuous gate, not single pipeline stage)\n- [ ] **QUAL-08**: Coordinator receives QA feedback and can reject/retry agent outputs\n- [ ] **QUAL-09**: Hallucination guards completed (L3 caps, code evidence filter, prompt hardening)\n\n### Observability\n\n- [ ] **OBSV-01**: Trace modal displays LLM call counts per wave and agent\n- [ ] **OBSV-02**: Trace modal displays timing breakdown per agent and wave\n- [ ] **OBSV-03**: Trace modal displays model info (which LLM, provider)\n- [ ] **OBSV-04**: Trace modal shows data flow — what went in/out of each agent to diagnose information loss\n\n## Future Requirements\n\n### VKB Navigation (v2.2)\n\n- **VKBN-01**: Tree navigation with hierarchy drill-down\n- **VKBN-02**: Breadcrumb navigation showing hierarchy path\n- **VKBN-03**: Entity detail view with observations and insight documents\n- **QUAL-04**: VKB entity detail panel shows \"Detailed Insight\" link to the insight document\n- **VKB-01**: Collapsible tree sidebar showing full hierarchy\n- **VKB-02**: Clicking a tree node filters the D3 graph to that subtree\n- **VKB-03**: Breadcrumb navigation computed from parent chain\n- **VKB-04**: Blue gradient visualization persists\n\n### Scoring (future)\n\n- **SIG-01**: Significance scoring for entities\n- **SIG-02**: <USER_ID_REDACTED> ranking for observations\n\n## Out of Scope\n\n| Feature | Reason {
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/coding/.planning/REQUIREMENTS.md",
  "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n### Content <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [ ] **QUAL-06**: Content validation enforced in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **QUAL-07**: QA agent validates every agent output (continuous gate, not single pipeline stage)\n- [ ] **QUAL-08**: Coordinator receives QA feedback and can reject/retry agent outputs\n- [ ] **QUAL-09**: Hallucination guards completed (L3 caps, code evidence filter, prompt hardening)\n\n### Observability\n\n- [ ] **OBSV-01**: Trace modal displays LLM call counts per wave and agent\n- [ ] **OBSV-02**: Trace modal displays timing breakdown per agent and wave\n- [ ] **OBSV-03**: Trace modal displays model info (which LLM, provider)\n- [ ] **OBSV-04**: Trace modal shows data flow — what went in/out of each agent to diagnose information loss\n\n## Future Describe how the system works\n    NOW, not when it changed. Git provides version history.\n  whitelist:\n  - CHANGELOG.md\n  - RELEASE*.md\n  - '**/.planning/**/*.md'"
}
```

  "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration.   "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n### Content <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [ ] **QUAL-06**: Content validation enforced in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **QUAL-07**: QA agent validates every agent output (continuous gate, not single pipeline stage)\n- [ ] **QUAL-08**: Coordinator receives QA feedback and can reject/retry agent outputs\n- [ ] **QUAL-09**: Hallucination guards completed (L3 caps, code evidence filter, prompt hardening)\n\n### Observability\n\n- [ ] **OBSV-01**: Trace modal displays LLM call counts per wave and agent\n- [ ] **OBSV-02**: Trace modal displays timing breakdown per agent and wave\n- [ ] **OBSV-03**: Trace modal displays model info (which LLM, provider)\n- [ ] **OBSV-04**: Trace modal shows data flow — what went in/out of each agent to diagnose information loss\n\n## Future   "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n### Content <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [ ] **QUAL-06**: Content validation enforced in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **QUAL-07**: QA agent validates every agent output (continuous gate, not single pipeline stage)\n- [ ] **QUAL-08**: Coordinator receives QA feedback and can reject/retry agent outputs\n- [ ] **QUAL-09**: Hallucination guards completed (L3 caps, code evidence filter, prompt hardening)\n\n### Observability\n\n- [ ] **OBSV-01**: Trace modal displays LLM call counts per wave and agent\n- [ ] **OBSV-02**: Trace modal displays timing breakdown per agent and wave\n- [ ] **OBSV-03**: Trace modal displays model info (which LLM, provider)\n- [ ] **OBSV-04**: Trace modal shows data flow — what went in/out of each agent to diagnose information loss\n\n## Future Requirements\n\n### VKB Navigation (v2.2)\n\n- **VKBN-01**: Tree navigation with hierarchy drill-down\n- **VKBN-02**: Breadcrumb navigation showing hierarchy path\n- **VKBN-03**: Entity detail view with observations and insight documents\n- **QUAL-04**: VKB entity detail panel shows \"Detailed Insight\" link to the insight document\n- **VKB-01**: Collapsible tree sidebar showing full hierarchy\n- **VKB-02**: Clicking a tree node filters the D3 graph to that subtree\n- **VKB-03**: Breadcrumb navigation computed from parent chain\n- **VKB-04**: Blue gradient visualization persists\n\n### Scoring (future)\n\n- **SIG-01**: Significance scoring for entities\n- **SIG-02**: <USER_ID_REDACTED> ranking for observations\n\n## Out of Scope\n\n| Feature | Reason |\n|---------|--------|\n| VKB tree navigation | v2.2 scope — v2.1 focuses on pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> |\n| MCP server interface changes | `ukb full` invocation must stay the same |\n| Agent framework rewrite | Extend existing coordinator, don't rewrite |\n| Real-time pipeline monitoring | Trace modal is sufficient for current needs |\n| Significance scoring | Revisit after pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> restored |\n\n## Traceability\n\nWhich phases cover which requirements.\n\n### v2.0 (Shipped)\n\n| Requirement | Phase | Status |\n|-------------|-------|--------|\n| WAVE-01 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| WAVE-02 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| WAVE-03 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| WAVE-04 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| WAVE-05 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n| WAVE-06 | Phase 5 | Complete |\n|   "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n###   "content": "# Requirements: Coding Project Knowledge Management\n\n**Defined:** 2026-03-04\n**Core Value:** Wave-based multi-agent pipeline producing self-sufficient hierarchical knowledge at every level\n\n## v2.0 Requirements (Shipped)\n\n### Wave Orchestration\n\n- [x] **WAVE-01**: Pipeline executes analysis in hierarchical waves (L0->L1->L2->L3) instead of a flat batch pass\n- [x] **WAVE-02**: Wave 1 agent surveys the entire project and produces L0 Project node + L1 Component nodes with comprehensive summaries\n- [x] **WAVE-03**: Wave 2 agents receive L1 results and produce L2 SubComponent nodes with detailed observations per component\n- [x] **WAVE-04**: Wave 3 agents receive L2 results and produce L3 Detail nodes with specific, deep knowledge\n- [x] **WAVE-05**: Wave controller ensures wave N completes fully before wave N+1 spawns\n- [x] **WAVE-06**: Within each wave, agents run in parallel (one agent per parent node being expanded)\n\n### Entity <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [x] **QUAL-01**: Each entity produced by the pipeline has 3+ meaningful, specific observations (not one-liner stubs)\n- [x] **QUAL-02**: Each entity gets a detailed insight document (markdown with architecture context, purpose, patterns)\n- [x] **QUAL-03**: Insight documents include PlantUML diagrams for architectural entities\n- [x] **QUAL-05**: Insight documents cross-reference related entities and parent/child relationships\n\n### Hierarchy Completeness\n\n- [x] **HIER-01**: L1 components have comprehensive sub-node coverage reflecting actual architecture (not just 2-3 children)\n- [x] **HIER-02**: Sub-nodes represent real architectural aspects discovered from code analysis, not generic labels\n- [x] **HIER-03**: Component manifest is auto-extended based on wave analysis discoveries\n- [x] **HIER-04**: Each hierarchy level provides self-sufficient knowledge useful at that granularity\n\n## v2.1 Requirements\n\nRequirements for Wave Pipeline <USER_ID_REDACTED> Restoration. Each maps to roadmap phases.\n\n### Agent Integration\n\n- [ ] **AGNT-01**: Wave agent LLM calls route through SemanticAnalyzer for deep, multi-observation analysis\n- [ ] **AGNT-02**: Semantic analysis agent integrated into wave pipeline (all 3 waves)\n- [ ] **AGNT-03**: Persistence agent restored in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **AGNT-04**: Insight generation agent produces detailed insight documents per entity\n- [ ] **AGNT-05**: Ontology classification agent fully integrated into wave pipeline\n\n### KG Operations\n\n- [ ] **KGOP-01**: Conversion operator (conv) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-02**: Aggregation operator (aggr) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-03**: Embedding operator (embed) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-04**: Dedup operator enabled with fuzzy name matching\n- [ ] **KGOP-05**: Prediction operator (pred) enabled in wave persistence\n- [ ] **KGOP-06**: Merge operator enabled with null-coalesce fix for parentId\n\n### Content <USER_ID_REDACTED>\n\n- [ ] **QUAL-06**: Content validation enforced in wave persistence path\n- [ ] **QUAL-07**: QA agent validates every agent output (continuous gate, not single pipeline stage)\n- [ ] **QUAL-08**: Coordinator receives QA feedback and can reject/retry agent outputs\n- [ ] **QUAL-09**: Hallucination guards completed (L3 caps, code evidence filter, prompt hardening)\n\n### Observability\n\n- [ ] **OBSV-01**: Trace modal displays LLM call counts per wave and agent\n- [ ] **OBSV-02**: Trace modal displays timing breakdown per agent and wave\n- [ ] **OBSV-03**: Trace modal displays model info (which LLM, provider)\n- [ ] **OBSV-04**: Trace modal shows data flow — what went in/out of each agent to diagnose information loss\n\n## Future hierarchy\n- **VKB-02**: Clicking a tree node filters the D3 graph to that subtree\n- **VKB-03**: Breadcrumb navigation computed from parent chain\n- **VKB-04**: Blue gradient visualization
